subject: Owner-directed all-files closeout commit window
body: Owner has directed me to run session handoff, then commit ALL current dirty files in logical groups regardless of commit queue state. This may include files under your active claim (pronoun correction sweep/root-cause distilled rule). I am announcing before touching the index. I will stop after handoff state is updated, all current files are committed, active claims/queue state is reported, and I produce the opener to exercise the plan.
